title: Voxels TACZ destruction
description: Adds voxel destruction of blocks from TACZ weapon bullets
body:
**Adds pixel destruction for all blocks from TACZ weapon bullets**

![damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c157c3e7d85a2f4ff78653f70a4a27633fe5a355_0.webp)

**This is an just experimental mod, so make backups**
